_scenario: Infant 2 months — Motor Development needs improvement (Z-score 63.5 < 65)
_mode_note: MONITOR: early gaps detected, light preventative activities

day1_activities.title: Tummy Time Reach
day1_activities.description: Place baby on tummy and hold a bright toy just out of reach. Do 2-3 sessions a day for 40 seconds.

day1_activities.title: Face Talk
day1_activities.description: Hold baby 30 cm away and make exaggerated facial expressions. Wait for baby to respond.

day1_activities.title: Wobble Balance
day1_activities.description: Tilt baby gently side to side while holding them safely. Helps them feel balance.
